title: MiCA Art. 45 — €200M/day Stablecoin Cap Binding from Q3 2026
summary: ESMA published binding technical standards under MiCA Article 45 setting a €200M/day retail transaction cap on all e-money tokens. Non-compliance triggers automatic suspension. Directly applicable — no national transposition required.
action: Review stablecoin issuance volumes immediately. Legal counsel engagement required before May 1. MakerDAO DAI and Lido stETH both within scope.

title: CLARITY Act Senate Markup Stalled — ABA Rejects White House Compromise
summary: The American Bankers Association formally rejected the White House-brokered CLARITY Act compromise on March 5, 2026. SEC/CFTC jurisdictional split over digital assets remains legally unresolved, creating acute uncertainty for custody architecture decisions.
action: Freeze custody structure commitments. Do not adopt SEC-only or CFTC-only compliance posture until jurisdiction is resolved.

title: SEC Staff Bulletin 2026-04 — AMMs at Risk of Broker-Dealer Classification
summary: SEC guidance clarifies that AMMs with governance tokens enabling fee extraction may qualify as broker-dealers under the Exchange Act. 60-day comment period open. No immediate enforcement action signaled.
action: Prepare legal analysis of governance token exposure. Low immediate risk — monitor for enforcement signals during comment period.

title: FCA PS26/1 — Travel Rule Threshold Lowered to £0 from June 2026
summary: FCA lowered the travel rule threshold to £0, requiring UK-regulated firms to collect full originator and beneficiary data on every crypto transfer regardless of size. Exceeds FATF guidance.
action: Update transaction monitoring infrastructure before June 1, 2026. Engage operations and compliance teams immediately.

title: MAS PSN02 — On-Chain Analytics Mandatory for DPT Licensees Q4 2026
summary: MAS revised DPT licensing criteria to mandate approved on-chain analytics tools for AML compliance. Three vendors approved. Existing licensees have until Q4 2026.
action: Verify analytics tooling against MAS approved vendor list.

title: VARA Rulebook V2 — Real-Time Proof-of-Reserves Required Jan 2027
summary: VARA updated custody rulebook requires full asset segregation and real-time proof-of-reserves for all licensed custodians. Effective January 2027 with 6-month grace period.
action: No immediate action. Add to 2027 compliance roadmap.
